title: Croatian Skillet Sausage Delight
description: A hearty, flavorful dish made with Croatian sausages, perfect for a cozy evening meal. This recipe combines the rich taste of sausages with a mix of vegetables, creating a satisfying and filling meal.
instructions: Slice the potatoes and onion. Cut the bell peppers into large pieces.
Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sausages and cook until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and bell peppers until they begin to soften.
Add the sliced potatoes, salt, black pepper, and tempting paprika to the skillet. Toss to combine.
Return the cooked sausages to the skillet and stir to combine with the potatoes and vegetables.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the sausages are cooked through.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with minced garlic.
